name: motion-director
description: Agent-ready cinematic product launch film engine: skill, MCP server, API, Playwright capture, audio analysis, and Remotion renderer.

scripts.build: npm --workspace @motion-director/core run build && npm --workspace @motion-director/audio-analysis run build && npm --workspace @motion-director/capture-playwright run build && npm --workspace @motion-director/renderer-remotion run build && npm --workspace @motion-director/mcp-server run build && npm --workspace @motion-director/api run build && npm --workspace @motion-director/studio run build
